creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #4)
> I have some problems fetching the distfile:

Sorry about that. Looking back at the timing of this, it looks like I submitted this patch before 4.7.2 was officially released! They must have had a release candidate version available for download and changed it slightly for the official release.
http://public.kitware.com/pipermail/community/2015-May/008956.html

I'll submit an updated patch.
